blocker_summary: Same DaCe-on-Python-3.13 SymPy break as the stencil failure. GT4Py is primarily a stencil DSL and column-kernel ergonomics would be a stretch even if the toolchain worked; the blocker is upstream of any column-specific assessment.
remediation: Same as stencil_failure.json: Python 3.12 venv carve-out, deferred to post-M2.
